title: protium costaricense
intro: Protium costaricense, also known as the "Copaiba Tree", is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Protium costaricense include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Protium costaricense include essential oils extracted from its resin, which can be used topically or added to traditional remedies such as teas and infusions.
